commitMessage: ui: update settings sidebar tab buttons

current_content.value:
ui.hStack(
        ui.image("circle.lefthalf.filled", "circle.lefthalf.fill", size: 20),
        ui.label("Theme"),
        ui.flexibleSpace(),
        ThemeSwitch(.themeMaterial),
      )

current_parent.description:
themeSettingStack = ui.vStack(
      spacing: .videoSettingsSpacing,
      ui.hStack(
        ui.image("circle.lefthalf.filled", "circle.lefthalf.fill", size: 20),
        ui.label("Theme"),
        ui.flexibleSpace(),
        ThemeSwitch(.themeMaterial),
      )
    )

arguments.value:
ui.hStack(
        ui.image("circle.lefthalf.filled", "circle.lefthalf.fill", size: 20),
        ui.label("Theme"),
        ui.flexibleSpace(),
        ThemeSwitch(.themeMaterial),
      )

old_content.value:
ui.hStack(
        ui.image("lightspectrum.horizontal", size: 20),
        ui.label("Theme"),
        ui.flexibleSpace(),
        ThemeSwitch(.themeMaterial),
      )

old_parent.description:
themeSettingStack = ui.vStack(
      spacing: .videoSettingsSpacing,
      ui.hStack(
        ui.image("lightspectrum.horizontal", size: 20),
        ui.label("Theme"),
        ui.flexibleSpace(),
        ThemeSwitch(.themeMaterial),
      )
    )

arguments.value:
ui.hStack(
        ui.image("lightspectrum.horizontal", size: 20),
        ui.label("Theme"),
        ui.flexibleSpace(),
        ThemeSwitch(.themeMaterial),
      )
